_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for every vendor manifest. Edit THIS file, then run `npm run gen:manifests`. Do NOT hand-edit the generated vendor manifests (.claude-plugin/, .codex-plugin/, .agents/, .mcp.json) — `npm run gen:manifests -- --check` (run by release:check) will fail if they drift from this source.

descriptions.standard: Agent Workflow SDK with TypeScript orchestration, dispatch, evidence-gated verification, state commits, scheduling, routines, multi-agent coordination, and MCP.
descriptions.long: Cool Workflow is an independent Agent Workflow SDK. It provides a TypeScript COL runtime, Workflow App SDK contracts, Router/Orchestrator, Subagent Dispatch, Deterministic Harness, Adversarial Verifier, Git/State Commit, Sandbox Profiles, scheduled tasks, routine triggers, a high-level Multi-Agent CLI/MCP host surface, and an MCP JSON-RPC 2.0 bridge. Developers write reusable workflow apps while an agent host executes tasks and records verified state.

defaultPrompt: Use Cool Workflow to plan this as phases and agents.
Run the architecture review workflow with CW.
Create a reusable CW workflow for this task.
